title: Red Hat Security Advisory: osbuild-composer security update
overview:
An update for osbuild-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Extended Update Support Long-Life Add-On.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.
description:
An image building service based on osbuild It is inspired by lorax-composer and exposes the same API. As such, it is a drop-in replacement.

Security Fix(es):

* golang: archive/tar: Unbounded allocation when parsing GNU sparse map (CVE-2025-58183)

For more details about the security issue(s), including the impact, a CVSS score, acknowledgments, and other related information, refer to the CVE page(s) listed in the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux AppStream AUS (v.8.4)
Red Hat Enterprise Linux AppStream EUS EXTENSION (v.8.4)
full_text:
An update for osbuild-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Extended Update Support Long-Life Add-On.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An image building service based on osbuild It is inspired by lorax-composer and exposes the same API. As such, it is a drop-in replacement.

Security Fix(es):

* golang: archive/tar: Unbounded allocation when parsing GNU sparse map (CVE-2025-58183)

For more details about the security issue(s), including the impact, a CVSS score, acknowledgments, and other related information, refer to the CVE page(s) listed in the References section.
